title: Jaya Janaki Nayaka
desc: Gagan, a brave young man, is unable to be with Sweety, his true love, due to her parents' disapproval of him. However, he vows to protect her after unknowingly saving her from gangsters.

title: Kadaram Kondan
desc: Vasu, a doctor, rescues KK, a criminal, from getting murdered in the hospital. However, when Vasu's wife gets kidnapped, he is asked to get KK out in exchange for his wife's safe return.

title: Saamy 2
desc: Ramasamy, who works as a front-end receptionist for Union Minister Viswanathan, decides to pursue civil service. Soon, Viswanathan's daughter falls in love with him after he saves her from gangsters.

title: Takkar
desc: A man who wants to be a millionaire meets a woman with a distaste for money. Their chance encounter, however, leads to an unexpected adventure.

title: Chithha
desc: Living a quiet life with his niece, Eeswaran manages to provide for her and nurtures her like a parent. However, his journey takes an insidious turn when she goes missing.

title: Pechi
desc: Accompanied by a guide, five friends go on a trekking trip to a haunted forest and despite being warned, they enter a restricted area that harbours an evil spirit.

title: Kadaikutty Singam
desc: Gunasingam, a rich farmer, lives a humble life with his family. However, things take a turn when he falls in love with the most beautiful woman in the village.

title: Super Hit Songs
desc: A comprehensive compilation of some of the most popular songs made by various music producers and artists is played back-to-back.

title: Vishwaroopam
desc: Nirupama hires a private investigator to keep a watch on her husband, Vishwanath. However, she is shocked to discover that there is more to him than meets the eye.

title: Super Hit Songs
desc: A comprehensive compilation of the greatest super hit songs is played back to back in order to entertain and enthrall the audience.

title: Lover
desc: Arun and Divya have been dating for six years. However, their relationship goes through a rough patch when insecurities and possessiveness creep in.

title: Bhanumathi
desc: Varun, an NRI medical student, and Bhanu, a vivacious, young woman, fall in love with each other. However, they face many personal differences that create complications in their relationship.

title: Eeswaran
desc: Periyasamy's sons decide to visit him with their families. While Eeswaran, his caretaker, oversees the preparations for this visit, he takes it upon himself to protect the family from danger.

title: Kalvan
desc: Kemban abandons his adopted grandfather in a forest to die at the hands of an animal, so that he would be compensated by the forest department. But the old man keeps surviving, which annoys Kemban.

title: Pushpa: The Rise - Part 1
desc: As Pushpa, a labourer, rises in the world of red sandalwood smuggling, he ends up making many enemies. However, violence ensues when the police try to topple his illegal business.

title: Vettai
desc: An inspector covertly collaborates with his brother to discipline offenders, but when a gangster uncovers their secret, the officer resolves to train under his sibling to confront the criminal.
